notes: MegaBugs polish + Browse Mods icons. MegaBugs main page defaults to New (was All) — and 'Open' status displays as 'New' across the page. New search box filters tickets by title, ID, or author. Detail header gets a Norse-font title, a coloured bug/feature badge, and the Status dropdown now shows the current status with its colour instead of a generic 'Status' label. Mods chip no longer towers over the others — count badge is height-bounded so all four header chips line up. Browse Mods 'Our Mods' featured section now shows the same per-mod Lucide icons as the Mods page (Shovel for MegaHoe, Crosshair for MegaShot, etc.) instead of identical Crowns.
